findings.location: 作成する機能の説明 (definition list section)
findings.description: The 5-step functional workflow description ('作成する機能の説明') is omitted. While it is primarily illustrated with images, the text describes the expected user flow: (1) click header menu link, (2) registration screen displayed, (3) enter full-width name and select industry then click Register, (4) confirmation screen displayed, (5) click Confirm to register to DB and show completion screen. This establishes the input→confirm→back/create flow pattern that is relevant for understanding the feature being implemented.
findings.source_evidence: 作成する機能の説明 / 1. ヘッダメニューの「顧客登録」リンクを押下する ... 5. 「確定」ボタンを押下し、データベースに顧客を登録して完了画面を表示する。
